name: Escape From Castle Frankenstein
short_description: Escape from Castle Frankenstein is a thrilling platformer game where you play as Frankenstein's monster, a creation desperate to flee the dark halls of the doctor's ominous castle. Will you outsmart Dr. Frankenstein and gain your freedom, or will you be trapped within these walls forever?
detailed_description:
Escape From Castle Frankenstein

 A thrilling platformer game where you play as Frankenstein's monster, a creation desperate to flee the dark halls of Dr. Frankenstein's ominous castle. Having come to life, you must navigate through a maze of intricate levels filled with deadly traps, mysterious obstacles, and other sinister creatures lurking in the shadows. Each room presents unique challenges, from puzzling mechanisms to fierce adversaries, all crafted to prevent your escape. As you traverse the eerie environment, you'll uncover hidden secrets about your own creation and the castle's foreboding history. Will you outsmart Dr. Frankenstein and gain your freedom, or will you be trapped within these walls forever? Gear up for an intense adventure where survival and escape are everything!


Key Features:


  • Classic Platformer Gameplay - Enjoy running and jumping through obstacles and collecting keys to escape.



  • Challenging Levels - Complete 30 challenging levels while you avoid traps, spikes, lava, pitfalls and more.



  • Arcade Mode - Complete all the levels and escape Dr. Frankenstein's castle to unlock Arcade Mode. In Arcade Mode, your goal is to race and collect as many coins as you can before time runs out. Collect various power-ups to boost your score, increase time, run speed and more. Can you top your best score?
